plan: Sell all leveraged ETFs (SOXL, SPAL) to zero.
Reduce exposure in SMH and CRWD to lower concentration.
Trim SPY to reduce its large weighting.
Increase QQQI to build income exposure.
Add AMD as a strong long setup from the scanner.
This plan prioritizes capital preservation and lowers leverage.
conservative.read: This plan aims for lower volatility and capital preservation. Expect a modest monthly target, with a focus on reducing risk and building a cash buffer.

plan: Trim SOXL and sell SPAL to reduce leveraged ETF exposure.
Reduce SMH and CRWD to manage sector and single-name concentration.
Trim SPY to bring its weighting closer to the mandate.
Add AMD and SNOW as strong long setups from the scanner.
This approach balances growth with risk reduction.
It aims for steady growth while managing leverage and concentration.
balanced.read: This plan seeks risk-first growth by trimming leverage and concentration while adding strong setups. Expect a moderate monthly target with controlled drawdowns.

plan: Increase SOXL and add SPAL to leverage strong semiconductor trends.
Add to SMH and CRWD to concentrate in high-conviction areas.
Trim SPY to free up capital for higher conviction adds.
Add AMD and RDDT as top-tier long setups from the scanner.
This plan maximizes exposure to strong trends and leverage.
It accepts higher potential drawdowns for accelerated growth.
aggressive.read: This aggressive plan seeks maximum growth by increasing leverage and concentrating in top-scoring setups. Expect higher potential gains but also significantly larger drawdowns due to leverage and daily rebalancing of leveraged ETFs.

plan: Sell all leveraged ETFs (SOXL, SPAL) and high-beta tech (CRWD, SMH).
Trim SPY to reduce its weighting.
Significantly increase QQQI to maximize income generation.
Add QQQ for broad market exposure and potential distributions.
This plan prioritizes stable monthly distributions.
It aims for capital preservation with reliable income over growth.
income.read: This plan focuses on generating steady monthly income and preserving capital. Expect low volatility and reliable distributions, with minimal growth potential and low drawdowns.
